entry.title: Re: SAP variant configuration and pricing - manual exchan...
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you Fancy.

We need to calculate line item value as similar to S/4 pricing as possible - not just item value but each varcond/element separately. To limit rounding issues comparing to how S/4 will be calculating sales order value later on.

At the end we will be sending rate to S/4 quote - there is a standard mechanism that can handle it and use for calculation.

Thats why we thought about using CPS that will work similar to S/4. And each varcond in CPQ and in S/4 will have same value in foreign currency.

Can we influence each pricing element/varcond with your approach?

 

For now we decided to make a bit different approach anyway to fulfill also parallel business reqs - so make in integration a specific mapping to S/4 only.

entry.title: Re: Delete or Clean Error Messages in SAC Story
entry.content: Thank you, I will try to use this API script... but anyway what I want is for the error messages to be visible, or to somehow group them all in a single container or something, so that it doesn't fill the screen with messages. Thanks again

entry.title: 🇩🇪 SAP CodeJam SAP Fiori elements flexible programming model (Walldorf, Germany)
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event is about the SAP Fiori elements flexible programming model (FPM). After a quick introduction to UI5, we will dive into the SAP Fiori elements and learn how to build a web application that allows users to browse and order books. Using the FPM, we will customise this SAP Fiori elements application. With this hands-on experience, you will be able to start developing your own SAP Fiori elements applications after this CodeJam.

The content for this SAP CodeJam is still work in progress and will be linked here, once it is ready.

This is an in-person event only (not virtual) and is planned for Wednesday 10 July 2024 at the DSAG Geschäftstelle in Walldorf, Germany from 10:00 - 16:00 local time. The language of the event and the content will be English. 

The instructor will be Developer Advocate Nico Schoenteich.

There are essential prerequisites that must be completed by every attendee, before arriving at the event location. They are documented here: https://github.com/SAP-samples/ui5-exercises-codejam/blob/main/chapters/1.00-prep-dev-environment/re....

Please note that spaces are limited - we can only accommodate 25 attendees. Register here in the Community Event using the RSVP functionality.

For more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees, head over to the SAP CodeJam group.

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 3

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA for Product Compliance: "Reverse" Outdated supplier status
entry.content:
Hi @Michael_Mulder .

Again, thank you for your answer. 

"Right now, once the status "outdated" is set, this is currently not reversable. " well, this is really inconvenient; and more, if one considers the position of the outdated button which is rather easy to click by mistake and the proneness to make errors by users (mainly due to work loads and some distraction).
Hope SAP solves this issue promptly.

Again, thank you.

entry.title: If we added a filter, shouldn't the select query run faster?
entry.content:
Hi Master,

When I run it with only the production plant(werks), the select query runs in a shorter time than when I run it with the production location and material.
How is this possible? Shouldn't the select query run faster when I add material?

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 1 - S/4HANA OData
entry.content:
Hello @Dan_Wroblewski ,

I am still struggling with Destination. Used the API Key from Accelerator Hub still getting 401-Unauthorized. Tried using TrustAll as well as suggested by @beny_illyes_mhp 

Can you help here?

entry.title: Re: Migration and Upgrade from SAP SCM 7.0 EHP3 on Window...
entry.content: Hi Marco, 1. You do not need to upgrade the existing source DB system, all the actions you have to perform in the target system with Windows server 2019 with DB2 11.5, your source system does not support DB2 11.5 in Windows server 2008. As per the SAP PAM. 2. Regarding the Live cache you have to upgrade the latest patch which is already mentioned in the SAP Note 919224, on the source system before migrating to the new Windows server 2019. 3. If possible you can perform the steps of any one of the tests or sandbox systems before getting into the live landscapes. Regards SS

entry.title: Re: National Pet Day! Post your pet!
entry.content: Nice!

entry.title: Re: Delete or Clean Error Messages in SAC Story

entry.title: Re: Displaying information of the client in the header of...
entry.content: Thank you!! i wasnt familiar with formatted searches, thank you!

entry.title: Empty Result Array Issue in Business Rules Service for Partner Creation Approval Process
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am encountering an issue while configuring the business partner creation approval live process. I am following the official configuration guide and am facing a challenge at the step where I need to enrich the base data using the My Inbox app.

Problem Description: After updating the data in My Inbox and attempting to submit it, the system sends a POST request to the following URL:

https://***process-automation.build.cloud.sap/BPManagement.comsapbpmEnrich/bpmrulesruntime/public/rule/runtime/rest/v2/rule-services

Although the request returns a status 200 (indicating that it has technically succeeded), the resulting data array is unexpectedly empty (Result: []). Here is the snippet of the code handling the response:

Questions:

1. Has anyone else experienced a similar issue with the My Inbox app in process automation environments?
2. Are there any known fixes or workarounds that can ensure the result array is not empty?

I appreciate any guidance or suggestions on how to resolve this. Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Asset transfer ABUMN - partial transfer of wrongly ad...
entry.content:
@beam_liang 

Invoice was posted in FY 2023.

Original value was 1142,59.  New purchase is 1213,71.  This amount should be transferred to new asset.

entry.title: Re: ASUG Philadelphia Chapter Meeting: April 4th, 2024
entry.content: Interesting

entry.title: SAP Datasphere DBADMIN and Data provisioning agent issue (AGENT ADMIN and ADAPTER ADMIN)
entry.content:
Hello all,

in regard to SAP Datasphere and SAP HANA Data Provisioning Agent: 

when we install the provisioning agent and connect the DB User from the Space Administration page to the provisioning agent, we are getting the issue:

Missing privileges for Agent Admin HANA user: S4HC_DATA_MIGRATION#DB_ADMIN [..]Ensure that the system privileges AGENT ADMIN and ADAPTER ADMIN are granted to agent admin HANA user.

How are we to grant these privileges to a Database user? in the SQL console we don't have sufficient privileges to do these grants.

Could not execute 'GRANT AGENT ADMIN TO S4HC_DATA_MIGRATION#SYSTEM' Error: (dberror) [258]: insufficient privilege

Is there a DBADMIN superuser for all Spaces on the Datasphere? Or how do we grant these privileges?

Best regards

T. Durham

entry.title: Re: Make editable a custom field in CS01 or CS02
entry.content:
The  tc_control module (added from note 1313559 doesnt provide enh options)

But if I remenber (from DIMP) there was another module to change SCREEN attributes, in the LOOP WITH CONTROL, look for module field_selection_loop which call a form, so you get some implicit Enh points (and an explicit one?)

Is it possible that we develop own service using custom table and publish it as oData (API) and then consume it anywhere?

entry.title: RFC registered program
entry.content:
Dear all,

We have an RFC destination with a gateway registered program which belong to an external server/application.

So, if that external server change the IP address, do we have to re-register the program with rfcexec in our gateway again or SAP will update the IP address and details using the hostname we provided ?

BR

https://help.sap.com/docs/HANA_SMART_DATA_INTEGRATION/7952ef28a6914997abc01745fef1b607/a9b579afd5ba45b3889dd69db985b7d6.html

entry.title: Re: Connect Cutomer IAS to our BTP Subaccount using Estra...
entry.content:
Hi @Francisco,

thanks for reading the long discussion and your suggested solution! I really appreciate it!

I'm far from an IAS expert, but I think I understood your suggestion. It would look something like this:

  • Customer SuccessFactors System
  • Customer IAS
  • Provider IAS
  • Provider BTP/CAP Application

How complicated is it to set up an authentication redirect?
Would you say one should use a new IAS per customer to keep this separate in a multitenant context?

I am very curious about @istvanbokor opinion whether this is a possible/valid approach. Or whether SAP currently has other recommendations how a customer IAS can be connected via OIDC.

Thanks & regards
Nico

entry.title: Re: Building custom app at SAP S/4 public cloud
entry.content: Hi @kaidehmann I have interest in finding out how we can also enhance the RAP BO Interface so we can for example include the custom fields, or do we enhance the RAP BO Interface, or we need another approach in order for example to be able to update the custom fields? Because to my understanding now we should use EML together with the RAP BO Interfaces to process data related to these RAP Objects, e.g. create a new Service Order - > we would use the EML statement Create on top of I_ServiceOrderTP. None of the RAP BO Interfaces gives us the option to update the custom fields (Z/Y Fields created by Custom Fields App). In addition, in the guide - the section 4.1.2 - Extensibility of RAP business objects (RAP BO) has it reference links not working at all, so I cannot check this information in the help/documentation.

entry.title: Re: Inactive employees in succession org chart
entry.content: I have the same issue, SAP suggested that I submit an enhancement request at our influence site. Please help me by voting for the request. https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/316978

entry.title: Extend Soap GoodsTagProcessing
entry.content:
Hello

We have created some extension fields used in tags/labels and we are able to use them in sap bydesign solution.

 


However we would like those field to be added to the associated soap service ManageGoodTags

GoodsTagGeneratorGoodsTagsOutputCreateRequest_sync
is it possible to add a field in this soap for it to be used in our tags templates? how?

<GoodsTagSpecification>
 <GoodsTagTypeCode>2</GoodsTagTypeCode>
  <OutputRequestFormTemplateCode>test</OutputRequestFormTemplateCode> 
  <PrintQueueID>Brother_Test</PrintQueueID>
  <MaterialKey>				   
    <ProductID>myproduct</ProductID>
  </MaterialKey>
  <IdentifiedStockKey>
   <ID>stock123</ID>
  </IdentifiedStockKey>
  <IndividualDetails>
   <GoodsTagMaterialQuantity unitCode='EA'>2</GoodsTagMaterialQuantity>
  </IndividualDetails>
  <CustomFieldXYZ></customFieldXYZ>
</GoodsTagSpecification>

entry.title: CSGORoll Promo Code 2024 “GAMBLE-CSGO” & Get 3 Free Cases
entry.content:
The CSGORoll promo code for 2024, "GAMBLE-CSGO," offers players 3 free cases upon using the code.

How to Use Promo Code:

1. Visit the CSGORoll website.

2. Sign up or log into your account.

3. Navigate to the section where you can enter promo codes.

4. Type "GAMBLE-CSGO" in the promo code field.

5. Submit the code to receive your 3 free cases.

Benefits of Promo Codes: Promo codes like "GAMBLE-CSGO" enhance user experience by providing free items, which can lead to extended gameplay or additional opportunities to win prizes without initial investment.

Conclusion: Utilizing the "GAMBLE-CSGO" promo code on CSGORoll is an excellent way for new and returning players to engage with the platform and gain extra rewards right at the start of their gaming experience.

entry.title: Re: Remote Code Analysis in ATC – Working with Exemptions
entry.content:
Good Morning Olga,

I am facing an issue with the adt exemption view in eclipse:

The exemptions are configured in ATC and exemptions can also be executed. However, the view does not display any exemptions.
System ist S/4 2023 FPS01 OnPrem.

Is there anything else to be set here? Authorization is SAP_ALL.
Unfortunately, I haven't found anything about this on SAPMe or in the forums.

Many thanks in advance
Norbert

entry.title: GRDC Derive Period from file and not from global parameters
entry.content:
Hi Community, 

If i import a data file, the period where the data is imported is not the period that is defined in the file, but the period in my Global Parameters. Is it possible to change that? In this setup, the danger is quit big that data is uploaded in the incorrect period.

entry.title: Re: Creating an SAP Account and getting started in the community
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano,

Thank you so mụch for this blog. But after I registered SAP account, when I tried to access to join a group for beginners to SAP, system informed that: "You do not have sufficient privileges for this resource or its parent to perform this action." So, I can't comment in your blog "Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)"

I'm a SAP MM Functional Consutant (S4 HANA) from Vietnam. I've been working in SAP fields for 3 years now. I have knowledge on SAP S4 HANA Sourcing and Procurement but not certified.

I identified as a person for this certification because I am a women, single, first generation college graduate in my family, people in remote or underserved locations that may be not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts, people looking to switch their careers.

I graduated from university with a major in accounting. But when I learned about SAP, I realized I really love learning and working with SAP because it helps businesses improve their processes and save working time. It's amazing to see how technology can make such a big difference. I want to keep learning and growing in this field to have a great career. 

I’ve just completed my learning journey acros "Discovering the Basics of SAP S/4HANA Manufacturing". So I'm eager to take a free certification attempt because I believe it will help me learn more and become even better at what I do. I know that the world of technology is always changing, and I want to stay up-to-date with the latest advancements. I am grateful for this opportunity and excited about the possibilities ahead. Thank you for considering my application for the free certification attempt.

Thanks & Regards,

entry.title: Re: Remote Code Analysis in ATC – Working with Exemptions
entry.content:
Hi Norbert,

it is not possible to use "ATC Exemptions" view for on-premise systems, you need still to use SAP GUI Exemption Browser to approve/reject exemptions. 

Best regards,
Olga.

entry.title: Re: Hotspot not working when EDIT is active
entry.content: I already answered "It's not possible. Use double click instead." I meant to have a hotspot field by default, and to change it to a non-hotspot editable field either by tabulation or by any button (ABAP code will change the definitions of fields).

entry.title: OM Custom Tables called in Payroll
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I need to pay location-based allowances to employees. As such, a custom infotype is created & amount or % is saved in it. I need to refer employee's Organizational Unit (ORGEH) in IT0001. Based upon this Org Unit's Custom infotype NNNN, I need to refer to the Amt or % field (XXXXX) to calculate the Location-based allowance.

I tried to call Z Table of the Z infotype using TABLEPNNNN & further to access its field Num = BXXXXX. But the payroll says this field can not be identified. "The PNNNN-XXXXX field could not be interpreted". 

May I know how to call that Custom infotype in Payroll ??

Thanks n Regards,

Bindumadhav Ambike

entry.title: Re: Error in SUM: MAIN_SHDPREPUT/RUN_RSPTBFIL_PREP_DIST_P...
entry.content:
Hi Sriram!

Yes:

Software Update Manager:
2.0 SP19 (PL4)
Software Logistics UI Client:
2.27.4
SAPUI5 Framework Version:
1.71.55
Software Logistics Protocol:
1.5.0

entry.title: Re: Hotspot not working when EDIT is active
entry.content: It's a bug in your program then. Or if it's not, check SAP notes or contact SAP support.

entry.title: Free Sap certification one attempt for student
entry.content:
Hey there, SAP community!

Hope everyone's doing great.

I'm currently a student and interning as a SAP FICO consultant.

I'm eager to learn more and would love to know if there are any opportunities for students to get a free shot at SAP certification,  Could you please advise me on how to access such opportunities?

Would really appreciate any guidance you can offer.

Thanks a bunch!

entry.title: Re: Hotspot not working when EDIT is active
entry.content: By the way, there are lots of SAP demo programs, try them to check what line is returned by the double click.

entry.title: Stake.us Promo Code 2024 "HellaUSA" & Get 55 SC + 260,000 GC
entry.content:
The Stake.us promo code for 2024, "HellaUSA," offers players 55 Sweep Coins (SC) and 260,000 Gold Coins (GC) when applied.

How to Use Promo Code:

  1. Visit the Stake.us website.
  2. Create a new account or log into an existing one.
  3. Find the section to enter promo codes during registration or in your account settings.
  4. Enter the promo code "HellaUSA." Submit the code to receive your 55 SC and 260,000 GC.

Benefits of Promo Codes:

Using promo codes like "HellaUSA" provides new users with a significant initial boost in both Sweep Coins and Gold Coins, enhancing the gaming experience without an initial deposit.

Conclusion:

The "HellaUSA" promo code is an excellent opportunity for users to start their experience on Stake.us with an ample amount of virtual currency, allowing them to explore and enjoy more games right away.

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Planning Data Action Advance Formula
entry.content:
Hi all

using Data action I have to multiply a measure (percentage) which is stored under unassigned for all dimensions except for Cost center and Date with Salary of all employee

I have around 400 employee.

when i multiply it does not produce any result.

 

 

 

CONFIG.GENERATE_UNBOOKED_DATA=OFF
MEMBERSET[d/GL_Account]=("700102","800204","620401")
MEMBERSET[d/SAP_Cost_Center]=(BASEMEMBER([d/SAP_Cost_Center].[h/H1] ,"Cell Tech","Elec Tech","SG&A","Support OH" ))	

	DATA([d/Measures]="Benefit_Dollar",[d/Date]="202401") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="Salary",[d/Date]="202401") *
	RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="FICA_Medicare",[d/EE_ID]="#",[d/Date]="202401",[d/GL_Account]="#",[d/HR_Band]="#",[d/Job_Title]="#",[d/Name]="#",[d/Type]="#")​

 

 

 

 

Can someone please help with this. Any solutions.

 

Thanks in advance.

 

SAP Analytics Cloud SAP Analytics Cloud for planning

I'm trying to import customers using a batch input that loads the BKNB1 table.

entry.title: Re: special characters are not getting converted sometimes while Outbound IDOC is triggered from S4
entry.content: My 2 cents: if RFC is sent to SAP PO, XML is not implied in EHS, so it's not a bug in EHS but a bug in SAP PO. If you used the standard SAP PO features to generate the XML, did you check SAP notes or contact SAP Support?

entry.title: Payment Integration-UTR Number from the Bank and send the payment advice to the vendor accordingly
entry.content: Please Help me regarding this Enhancement.

entry.title: Stake.com Promo Code in 2024: Use “Hella200” & Get 200% Deposit Bonus up to $3000
entry.content:
The Stake.com promo code for 2024, "Hella200," provides a 200% deposit bonus up to $3000, enhancing players’ initial investment significantly.

How to Use Promo Code:

  1. Navigate to the Stake.com website.
  2. Register or log in to your existing account.
  3. Enter the promo code "Hella200" in the designated promo code section during the deposit process.
  4. Make your deposit, and the bonus will be applied, offering up to $3000 based on the amount deposited.

Benefits of Promo Codes: The "Hella200" promo code offers a substantial increase to your playing funds, allowing for a longer playtime and more opportunities to win, making it a valuable tool for new or returning players.

Conclusion: The "Hella200" promo code from Stake.com is an excellent opportunity for players to maximize their deposits, providing a significant boost to their gaming funds and enhancing their overall gambling experience.

entry.title: CK40N costing level doesn't show materials costed without errors
entry.content:
Hello,

In CK40N, on tab "Costing levels" the following is displayed:

Level No objects Mesage No COst estimates Costing msgs Status Costing status
7 12 0 12 2 KA Costed Without Errors
6 40 0 40 114 KF Costed with Errors
5 286 0 286 202 KF Costed with Errors
4 489 0 489 63 KF Costed with Errors
3 1.627 0 1.627 117 KF Costed with Errors
2 7.502 0 7.502 381 KF Costed with Errors
1 914 0 914 90 KF Costed with Errors

Looks like 12 materials have been costed overall without error. But this is not the case. 12 materials on level 7 have been costed without error. But there are more materials that have been costed without error, if I go to "Material Overview", on a different level. But these materials are not shown on tab "Costing levels" with status KA Costed without error.

Is that a bug, should I open an incident to SAP?

Thank you,
Joachim

entry.title: Impact of reverting ADVANCED_INDEX_COMPRESSION_OPTIONS parameter
entry.content:
Hi Sap,

We are reverting ADVANCED_INDEX_COMPRESSION_OPTIONS parameter and rebuilding the affected indexes in our SAP environment. 

Please let us know if 

  1. Any potential risks or side effects associated with this change.
  2. Impact on data consistency.
  3. Any recommended best practice or steps to mitigate risks and ensure a smooth transition.

Thanks,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Impact of reverting ADVANCED_INDEX_COMPRESSION_OPTION...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

The only side effect of the change is that the index size will be bigger without the compression.

On the data inconsistency there won't be any impact.

For more information you can check below note:

2138262 - Oracle Database 12c Advanced Compression for SAP Systems 

Best regards,
SAP Product Support

entry.title: Roobet Promo Codes 2024: Use Code “HELLAGO” & get up to $200 daily + 20% cashback for 7 days
entry.content:
Roobet promo codes for 2024 include the code "HELLAGO," which offers up to $200 daily and 20% cashback for 7 days.

How to Use Promo Code:

  1. Visit the Roobet website.
  2. Create an account or log in.
  3. Navigate to the promo code section, which is typically found in the account or deposit area.
  4. Enter "HELLAGO" and apply it to activate the benefits.

Benefits of Promo Codes: The "HELLAGO" promo code greatly enhances user experience by providing significant daily bonuses and cashback, making gaming more rewarding.

Conclusion: Using the "HELLAGO" code on Roobet allows players to maximize their potential returns and enjoy their gaming experience with added financial benefits.

entry.title: CIG transaction tracker handling
entry.content:
Since 2024 we are sending documents via Ariba CIG which means we had some time to get familiar with Transaction Tracker, especially for error handling. This question might be related to missing experience but we checked all available CIG documentation and did not find proper answers.

As per our impression, CIG transaction tracker seems to be foreseen for "manual" handling or the handling of a lower number of documents. Please find our biggest concerns below:

1. It doesn't seem to be possible to be actively informed about errors (e.g. in case of failed status) and to set up any scheduled reports
-> That means it seems to be necessary to login to CIG on a regular basis and manually search for documents or download the list in excel

2. If you download a list of documents, the error message in case of failed status is not part of the list at all
-> You can only see document errors by using mouseover function for each document. This highly increases the analysis effort

3. It is not possible to do any kind of clearing in CIG (delete / obsolete failed documents)
-> That means it is impossible to keep track of which documents have been already cleaned up and which still require attention

4. Maximum document number to be downloaded in excel is 5000
-> currently we exchange already more than 5000 documents per day. As we just have migrated 25% of our suppliers to CIG, this number will extremely grow. We can't download a list several times a day to track documents. 

 

We would appreciate to receive any feedback / best practices about how other Partners are dealing with CIG transaction tracker, especially those with higher document count. Do you see any solution for the issues described above?

entry.title: Re: Variant management & View functionality
entry.content:
Hello ghemraj,

Apologies for the confusion. View Creation is a specific terms in process intelligence.

In process manager you can indeed create views. A view can be use to see a model which contains different variants of one process. However, in a view, you solely include what you want to show an audience and exclude what the audience does not need to see. You do not create variant there.


Examples for using different views of process models:
• A model contains both user activities and elements for technical implementation. The audience wants to
focus on the technical implementation.
• A model contains different variants of one process. The audience should only view one variant.
• A model contains the expected path of a process and a number of exceptions. The audience doesn't need to see the exceptions.

 

Variant management is about creating specific process and witness their execution in diverse setups. Variant Management is managing the multitude of variants in processes by both identification and modeling of variants.

 

Let me know if that's help.

entry.title: Hide Crystal report parameter while execute report into SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

Need to disable / Hide parameter while execute the crystal report into SAP Business One. I have tried also with "Do not show option" under Show on Panel (Viewer) but it is not working.

Need to hide parameter of document numbering ask each time while CR is running into SAP B1. 

SAP Business one with MS SQL

Regards,

Nikunj Mehta

entry.title: Re: Build an AI Chatbot to Search for Content on the SAP Help Portal Using a Backend Service
entry.content:
Hello, 

When i tried to push the application to Cloud Foundry,

it is showing Missing Package.json error.

can you please support me

entry.title: Re: Table for sap query users group and assigned user
entry.content: Just in case other users are looking for similar information. I just came across this program in SA38 while looking for last execution and usage for SQ01 queries. You can find assigned user to each user group in SQ03 using SA38 and then execute RSAQUSGR. Enter either name or user group to receive the information.

entry.title: Re: RAP service consumption model - OData $expand issue
entry.content: here I put the solution: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/usage-of-expand-entity-in-odata-service-consumption-model/ba-p/13598261

entry.title: Re: Itemized Down Payment Clearing in MIRO
entry.content: Dear Experts. Can I get any guidance on the above mentioned issue?

entry.title: Re: Creating Sales Order Drafts via SAP Business One Serv...
entry.content: I got the OwnerCode to be updated by using the DocumentsOwner key. I checked the Data Transfer Workbench template and saw that this was the key to the OwnerCode column.

entry.title: Transferring of Data between Enhancements using Singleton Class
entry.content:
Hi Experts 

I'm facing a strange issue while using Singleton class object with a static data attribute to transfer data between two enhancements in the update task. 

In the Enhancement 1, I'm creating an instance of the class and using a Put method to set certain data to a static attribute of the class which I want to pass on to the second enhancement. 

In the Enhancement 2, I'm using the instance of the singleton class and retrieving the data passed in Enhancement 1 using a GET method.  

Both the enhancements are called in the Update Task.

Now the issue. When I place a break point in both the enhancement and execute the process, things work fine. In the Enhancement 2, the class's object is already available and I'm able to get the data transferred from Enhancement 1 using the GET method. 

But when I don't use the debugging, when the background process executes Enhancement 2, somehow the class object is not instantiated, and the data passed from Enhancement 1 is lost. 

Any pointers on why this is happening and how to resolve this would be much helpful. 

Thanks

entry.title: Multiple ECTR Installations ECC-5.1 and S4-1.2 on Clients
entry.content:
Hi folks,

I have the following problem:
We have ECC systems (ECTR 5.1) and S4 systems (ECTR S4 1.2) in our landscape.

ECTR is already set up on the clients for the ECC system, but not yet for S4.

How can I make both systems work with ECTR?

As far as I can see, we cannot make one client installation work for both. We need one installation for ECC and one for S4.

Unfortunately, the installations in the directory C:\ProgramData\SAP\ECTR\installation\ectr overwrite each other.

Once this problem has been solved, the next one will come up:
The Env variable %PLM_INSTDIR% is consumed by both installations.

This is certainly not an isolated case for us.
Does anyone here have any experience?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Mass comparison of Roles
entry.content: Is this document available somewhere else?

entry.title: Re: Create a NodeJs based API Service for BTP Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
Hi kapil,

 

Thank you for your blog. can you please tell me which credentials i should use here.

Admin and supersecret?

entry.title: Full day Leave Request
entry.content:
Is it Possible to male visible only Full Day Option From Drop Down List While Creating Leave Request?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Full day Leave Request
entry.content:
According to the designed system behavior, this functionality is not available . Half day and Full day options are by default shown in drop down while creating Leave request.

We request you to please post your requirement with the customer influence forum available in the link < https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/886 >

entry.title: BC.Game Casino Promo Code 2024: Use "hella" & Get 120% Deposit Bonus
entry.content:
The BC.Game Casino promo code for 2024 is "hella," which provides a 120% deposit bonus to enhance the initial funding of new and existing users.

How to Use Promo Code:

  1. Access the BC.Game Casino website.
  2. Register for an account or log in if you already have one.
  3. Navigate to the deposit section and enter the promo code "hella" in the appropriate field.
  4. Complete your deposit, and the 120% bonus will be credited to your account.

Benefits of Promo Codes: Using the promo code "hella" significantly boosts your deposit, allowing for extended gameplay and more opportunities to explore various games within the casino.

Conclusion: The "hella" promo code at BC.Game Casino is an excellent opportunity for players to maximize their deposits, offering a substantial increase that can be used across a wide range of games, thus enhancing the overall casino experience.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/protect-and-control-sales-order-margins-with-business-rules/ba-p/13525154

entry.content:
The Gamdom promo code "top100list" offers users a 60% rakeback, providing significant returns on their betting amounts.

How to Use Promo Code:

  1. Visit the Gamdom website.
  2. Sign up for a new account or log into your existing one.
  3. Enter the promo code "top100list" when prompted during the registration or deposit process.
  4. Once the code is applied, you will start receiving 60% rakeback on your bets.

Conclusion: Using the "top100list" promo code at Gamdom maximizes player returns, making it a lucrative option for both new and seasoned bettors.

entry.title: Re: How to receive and invoice bitcoin in SAP - Proof of Concept
entry.content:
Hi Koni, great work! 

To integrate that such kind of payment solution into real SAP product SAP should offer such "BTCpayserver" application via BTP. 

But as you said first SAP should provide a solution to manage BTC. That includes management of UTXO (so management of private keys). I'm thinking on multi-sig solution where at least two signatures are needed to "interact" with BTC protocol. 

Then BTC subledger is needed to valuate BTC holdings and get it into financial reporting.

  2. Create a new account or log in.
  3. Enter the referral code "top100list" in the designated promo code field.
  4. The free Gift Case will be added to your account automatically upon successful code redemption.

Benefits of Promo Codes: This promo code offers a direct reward, providing new or existing users with a free Gift Case, which can contain various in-game items.

Conclusion: The "top100list" code is a great way for users to enhance their CSGOEmpire experience by starting with a free gift, potentially increasing their enjoyment and engagement with the platform.

entry.title: How to get SOA Manager Logical Port configuration Details in ABAP program
entry.content:
Hi colleagues,

Can anyone help me how to retrieve the authentication data like user name in logical port? In tcode SOAMANAGER > Service Administration > Web Service Configuration then Search by Consumer Proxy then Display. I would like to get the userID in ABAP program. Can someone help me know in what table were they stored?

From my side I have used ST05 to trace the webservice update process. But I couldn't find related data from the table which listed by ST05 like SRT_CFG_DIR, SRT_CFG_CLI_ASGN, SRT_RTC_CFGVAL, SRT_RTC_DATA, etc.....

Is the authentication data not stored in SAP table or it stored as some encrypt  format? I only need to get the Logical Port authentication UserID to generate a report to list it for different configuration connection.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to obtain the monthly SalesOrder amount
entry.content:
Hi AngelaDai

Thanks you for the answers.
We wanted to be able to see the monthly order volume in SAC and custom analysis reports, so we needed to be able to extract it with CDSView.
Since it does not seem to exist in CDSView, it seems that there is no other way than to create the data in an external system.

Best regards,

Kyosuke

entry.title: FP2402 New Installation
entry.content:
We are testing the installation of a new server:

WS2022+SQL 2019+Business One 10.0 FP2402+Crystal 2020 SP4

The installation was carried out without problems, no warnings, or errors.

When accessing the system services we have observed that the Job Service is not there. I am attaching the image "Services 10.0 FP2402.png" with the services installed.

Services in SO

When accessing the SLD, the image "Control center.png" appears correctly attached.
The registered services appear correctly attached image "SLD.png"

SLD control center

Services in SLD

When accessing the job service from the SL, this appears attached as "Job Service.png"

Job Service
According to the product documentation, there should be a service as such in the operating system and the window that the SLD opens should be different.


Then 2 options are presented:
Does SAP not have something well documented or updated in the installation guides?
Is it installed correctly, is the workflow service the one that controls the alerts and the sending of alerts in this version?

This same problem has arisen in the migration from version 9.3 to 10.0 FP2208 carried out in production.
We think that it is a problem or circumstance derived from the migration and change of technology to 64 bits of services, etc., but the surprise is that in a new installation made from scratch, this is also the case.

entry.title: Re: If we added a filter, shouldn't the select query run faster?
entry.content: Try ST05 and "Explain" (https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-blog-posts/the-sql-trace-st05-quick-and-easy/ba-p/12823559). Select Execution plan is most likely confused. You have quite many joins, conditions etc. so it might behave strange. Also check indexes.

entry.title: How to create a REST API to accept undefined variables in URL & Headers?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,
 
We need to develop an API in SAP PO that will be consumed by another system, but the requirement is in such a way that we should be able to accept API calls regardless of what’s sent in the {variable} part of the example URL below.
 
Example URL: https://host:port/RESTAdapter/{variable1}/{variable2}/{variable3}...../{variablen} where variables, parameters and number of variables & parameters are not predefined and can be anything.

Headers, payload structures & operations (GET, POST etc.) as well are all going to be variable. We would never know what the invoked URL, headers, payload structures and HTTP methods will be. Variables can be anything & everything is what we were told. These variables from sender are also expected to be captured by PO & utilized when making the connection with receiver. Please advise if this can be implemented.

Conclusion: The "gamblecsgo100" promo code is an excellent starting boost for new Keydrop users, offering free credits and a bonus on initial deposits, encouraging more extensive exploration and engagement on the platform.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to set filter values using URL Paramet...
entry.content:
Hi,

Is this for Fiori elements OData V2 or V4? In any case, adding a filter value in the URL should already work - something like abc.html#<Semantic Object>-<Action>?OrderType=ABC

This should bring in ABC value into the OrderType filter property. The other (more standard) way would be to define this as a FLP TargetMapping property for this intent and then have this value passed from the source application. Maybe https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_NETWEAVER_750/cc1c7615ee2f4a699a9272453379006c/bd8ae3d327ab4541bcce8e7353c046fc.html?version=7.5.17 is helpful.

Best Regards,

   Sandeep

The Datdrop promo code for 2024, "top100list," provides an additional 5% bonus to every deposit made.

  2. Sign in or register for a new account.
  3. Enter the promo code "top100list" in the promo code field when making a deposit.

Benefits of Promo Codes: This code increases the value of each deposit, giving users more funds to enjoy Datdrop's offerings.

Conclusion: The "top100list" promo code is a simple and effective way to enhance your Datdrop experience by providing a continuous boost to your deposit amounts, allowing for more extensive gameplay or purchases.

entry.title: Re: If we added a filter, shouldn't the select query run...
entry.content: Only, if there is an index on these fields. Otherwise a full table scan is done.

entry.title: Re: Cloud-Native Lab #2 - Comparing Cloud Foundry and Kyma Manifests
entry.content:
Sure, this is the deployment manifest

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: testapp-s4cloud-connection
  namespace: tests-testapp-s4hanacloud-connection
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: testapp-s4cloud-connection
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: testapp-s4cloud-connection
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: testapp-s4cloud-connection
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: 'false'
    spec:
      imagePullSecrets: [{'regcred'}]
      containers:
        - name: testapp-s4cloud-connection
          image:  repo2024/testapp_btp_connection:0.1.7-SNAPSHOT
          resources:
            requests:
              memory: 64Mi
              cpu: 50m
            limits:
              memory: 128Mi
              cpu: 100m
            ports:
              - containerPort: 8080
                name: http
            imagePullPolicy: Always
            env:
              - name: SERVICE_BINDING_ROOT
                value: "/bindings"
            volumeMounts:
              - name: testapp-destination-test
                mountPath: "/bindings/testapp-destination-test"
                readOnly: true
              - name: my-xsuaa-test
                mountPath: "/bindings/my-xsuaa-test"
                readOnly: true
      volumes:
        - name: testapp-destination-test
          secret:
            secretName: testapp-destination-test-binding
        - name: my-xsuaa-test
          secret:
            secretName: my-xsuaa-test-binding
---
 apiVersion: v1
 kind: Service
 metadata:
  name: testapp-s4cloud-connection
  labels:
    app: testapp-s4cloud-connection
 spec:
   type: NodePort
   ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP
   selector:
     app: testapp-s4cloud-connection

entry.title: Re: SAP Build process Automation - Document Extraction Se...
entry.content:
Hi Nico,

thank you very much for your quick response! It took me some time but i configured „Configure SAP Document Management Service for Process Attachments“. Unfortunately, I still get the same error message. Additionally, I don't think my workflow is based on a destination environment variable.

Do you have any other ideas what the reason for the error message could be? Thank you!!!

Best, regards

Julian

entry.title: SAC Story Filters: Advanced Filtering with BW Live Data
entry.content:
Hello there,

I am searching for the possibility of advanced filtering with BW live models in the SAC - but I only can find this option in imported models but not with BW live models? (It's the same both with classic stories as well as optimised stories.)

In SAP help it seems as if it should work... or at least there is no exclusion defined for BW live models?

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/90c10b3bc47944f39cdaa3cc002fe96a.html?locale=en-US

Thanks and best regards,
Martin

entry.title: Re: Migration and Upgrade from SAP SCM 7.0 EHP3 on Window...
entry.content: Hi Sriram, about your last reply: is there a procedure that we can follow in order to avoid to perform any actions on source Livecache system before upgrading SAP SCM 7.0 EHP3 ? Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Enhancement in MIGO
entry.content:
Requirement : Enhancement in MIGO

T-Code - MIGO

Current situation:

In MIGO, when we put outbound delivery number and press enter it automatically takes the document date as system date and delivery no. as outbound delivery number (same as of we entered first).

Expected requirement:

Now, for particular case (for A01 Goods Receipt and R05 Outbound Delivery), when we put outbound delivery number and press enter it automatically takes the document date as system date and delivery no. it should automatically take the invoice no. (VBELN) and created on (ERDAT).

  • I have tried using BAdI MB_MIGO_BADI but I am not able to modify the document date and delivery note.
  • I have also tried using MB_DOCUMENT_UPDATE but it is also not triggering there. As I am using SAP ECC 6.0,  this BAdI does not contain a method MB_DOCUMENT_BEFORE_UPDATE. It is there in S/4 HANA but not in ECC.
  • I have also tried USER EXIT MBCF0002, but it is not triggering on ENTER. It is triggering on check.

What should be the solution for this?
Please help.

entry.title: Re: CRM Courses
entry.content:
CRM courses can definitely be a good springboard for diving into the world of customer relationship management. But have you considered the wild world of project management tools like monday.com? It's like oiling the CRM engine – keeping things organized and tasks flowing smoothly.

I recently started working with a monday.com consultant, and let me tell you, it's been a game-changer. They helped me streamline my workflows and visualize everything in one place. It felt like going from a rolodex to a sleek, digital rolodex with superpowers!

Don't get me wrong, CRM is essential, but monday.com can be a fantastic sidekick. It's like having a personal CRM butler ensuring everything runs like clockwork.
